Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from hedwig.sources.hackernews import HackerNewsSource
from hedwig.sources.reddit import RedditSource
from hedwig.sources.geeknews import GeekNewsSource

async def test\(\):
    hn = HackerNewsSource\(\)
    reddit = RedditSource\(\)
    geeknews = GeekNewsSource\(\)

    hn_posts = await hn.fetch\(limit=10\)
    print\(f'HN: {len\(hn_posts\)} posts'\)
    for p in hn_posts[:3]:
        print\(f'  - {p.title[:80]}'\)

    reddit_posts = await reddit.fetch\(limit=10\)
    print\(f'Reddit: {len\(reddit_posts\)} posts'\)
    for p in reddit_posts[:3]:
        print\(f'  - [{p.extra.get\(\\"subreddit\\",\\"\\"\)}] {p.title[:80]}'\)

    gn_posts = await geeknews.fetch\(limit=10\)
    print\(f'GeekNews: {len\(gn_posts\)} posts'\)
    for p in gn_posts[:3]:
        print\(f'  - {p.title[:80]}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
